use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};

/// {{ type_name }} type definition
/// 
/// Generated from OpenAPI schema: {{ type_name }}
/// This type represents the structure defined in the OpenAPI specification.
#[derive(Debug, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
pub struct {{ type_name }} {

    /// {{ field.name }} field
    {% if field.optional %}#[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]{% endif %}
    pub {{ field.name }}: {% if field.optional %}Option<{{ field.ty }}>{% else %}{{ field.ty }}{% endif %},
